pairs.a_topic: Market Saturation Narrative Is Usually a Performance Problem

pairs.a_text: Alex Hormozi defines authenticity as the degree to which a person behaves the same way in public as they do when alone and unobserved (no risk of punishment). pairs.b_text: Alex Hormozi distinguishes three social-signal terms: shame (breaking someone else's rules), guilt (breaking your own rules), and cringe (supposed secondhand embarrassment from an observer).
